name: ambiguous-compare-cities
description: Edge case: vague 'compare' with no chart type specified
rubric: The request is deliberately vague. A valid chart must use at least one meaningful dimension (avg_temp or precipitation) and distinguish cities visually. Acceptable: grouped bar, multi-series line, faceted chart, or scatter chart. FAIL if model asks for clarification without rendering anything. FAIL if chart doesn't distinguish the three cities (e.g., no fill/stroke by city).
